title: NaverMap Marker System Refactoring - Wave 4-5
description: Complete the NaverMap marker refactoring: update NaverMap.svelte to accept FacilityMarker[] with backward compatibility, refactor 4 consumer files, and add TDD tests. Category defaults to 'property' for backward compat.

title: Wave 4: NaverMap.svelte refactoring with FacilityMarker support
description: Refactor NaverMap.svelte to accept FacilityMarker[] with backward compatibility. Make category optional (default: 'property'). Apply MARKER_STYLES for SymbolIcon rendering. Key files: src/components/map/NaverMap.svelte, src/lib/map/markerStyles.ts, shared/types/index.ts. Backward compat: existing {lat, lng, title} objects work without changes.

title: Wave 5a: Consumer refactoring - report page and map-test
description: Refactor NaverMap consumers in src/routes/report/[id]/+page.svelte (property marker + amenity pins) and src/routes/map-test/+page.svelte (test markers). Convert to FacilityMarker format with appropriate categories.

title: Wave 5b: Consumer refactoring - analysis request and LifePoints
description: Refactor NaverMap consumers in src/routes/(auth)/analysis/request/+page.svelte (location selection marker) and src/components/preference/LifePoints.svelte (Life Points markers). Convert to FacilityMarker format.

title: Wave 5c: NaverMap TDD tests
description: Write TDD tests for NaverMap marker rendering: verify FacilityMarker with categories renders correct SymbolIcon styles, backward compat with simple markers works, and edge cases (empty array, null coords).

title: Phase 10 CONTEXT.md 결정사항 검증
description: Phase 10의 UX 결정사항이 최선의 선택인지 연구하여 권장사항 도출

title: Research: Preference Save UX 패턴 조사
Research: Search Dropdown UI 패턴 조사
Synthesize: 검증 결과 종합 및 권장사항
API Documentation Generation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for all external APIs used in the Home Comparator codebase in docs/apis/ folder. 6 APIs: VWorld, Seumter, Tmap, Public Data Portal, Naver Maps, Supabase.

title: Korean Public Data Portal API Documentation
